title: What Makes You Beautiful

writers.lyricist: Yacoub, Rami/Kotecha, Savan Harish/Falk, Carl Anthony
writers.composer: Yacoub, Rami/Kotecha, Savan Harish/Falk, Carl Anthony

lyrics.text: You're insecure
lyrics.translation: 你没有安全感

lyrics.text: Don't know what for
lyrics.translation: 不知道为什么

lyrics.text: You're turning heads when you walk through the door
lyrics.translation: 你走过门的时候转过头

lyrics.text: Don't need make-up
lyrics.translation: 不需要化妆

lyrics.text: to cover up
lyrics.translation: 去掩盖什么

lyrics.text: Being the way that you are is enough
lyrics.translation: 做你自己就足够了

lyrics.text: Everyone else in the room can see it
lyrics.translation: 房间里的人都看得出来你的美

lyrics.text: Everyone else but you
lyrics.translation: 每个人除了你自己

lyrics.text: Baby you light up my world like nobody else
lyrics.translation: 宝贝没人能像你这样照亮了我的世界

lyrics.text: The way that you flip your hair gets me overwhelmed
lyrics.translation: 你撩动头发的样子让我疯狂着迷

lyrics.text: But when you smile at the ground it ain't hard to tell
lyrics.translation: 但当你对着地面笑的时候不难察觉

lyrics.text: You don't know Oh oh
lyrics.translation: 你不知道

lyrics.text: You don't know you're beautiful
lyrics.translation: 你不知道你很美

lyrics.text: If only you saw what I can see
lyrics.translation: 如果你能看见我所看到的

lyrics.text: You'll understand why I want you so desperately
lyrics.translation: 你会了解为什么我那么的渴望拥有你

lyrics.text: Right now I'm looking at you and I can't believe
lyrics.translation: 现在我看着你我真不敢相信

lyrics.text: You don't know Oh oh
lyrics.translation: 你不知道

lyrics.text: You don't know you're beautiful Oh oh
lyrics.translation: 你不知道你很美

lyrics.text: That's what makes you beautiful
lyrics.translation: 这就是为什么你如此美丽

lyrics.text: So c-come on
lyrics.translation: 所以来吧!

lyrics.text: You got it wrong
lyrics.translation: 你理解错了

lyrics.text: To prove I'm right
lyrics.translation: 为了证明我是对的

lyrics.text: I put it in a so-o-ong
lyrics.translation: 我把这写成一首歌

lyrics.text: I don't know why you're being shy
lyrics.translation: 我不知道你为什么正在害羞

lyrics.text: And turn away when I look into your eyes
lyrics.translation: 当我看着你的眼眸时你将头撇开

lyrics.translation: 房间里的人都看得出来你的美
